dublinCore.dc:title: 119 S3748 IS: Terminate Unaccountable Spending, Abuse, Deception, and Fraud Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

form.current-chamber: IN THE SENATE OF THE UNITED STATES

action.action-desc: Mr. Lee introduced the following bill; which was read twice and referred to the Committee on Foreign Relations

form.official-title: To terminate the United States African Development Foundation.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Terminate Unaccountable Spending, Abuse, Deception, and Fraud Act.

section.header: Termination of the United States African Development Foundation

subsection.text: The African Development Foundation Act (title V of Public Law 96–533; 22 U.S.C. 290h et seq.) is repealed.

paragraph.text: Section 127(b) of the Trade and Development Act of 2000 (19 U.S.C. 3737(b)) is amended by striking paragraph (4).
Section 620(q)(2) of the Foreign Assistance Act of 1961 (22 U.S.C. 2370(q)(2)) is amended by striking the African Development Foundation Act,.
Section 4(8) of the Global Food Security Act of 2016 (22 U.S.C. 9303(8)) is amended by striking the United States African Development Foundation,.
